title: Verify floating pill displays for Day 2-10 trial users
description: Test that the floating pill widget appears on homepage for users on Day 2-10 of their trial
preconditions: User has activated a trial within 2-10 days

steps.description: 1. Log in with a user account that has Day 2-10 trial active
4. Verify pill displays trial remaining days

expected_result: Floating pill is visible on homepage showing remaining trial days
